title: 10 best herbal teas for joint stiffness
description: Withania somnifera, also known as ashwagandha, teas helps with joint stiffness because it contains adaptogenic compounds that help reduce inflammation and promote relaxation. The tea's anti-inflammatory properties soothe and calm the joints, reducing pain and stiffness associated with conditions like arthritis.
